label: 146_crossborder payments_crossborder_iso 20022_20022
description: ISO 20022 standards are discussed in speeches by Victoria Cleland of the Bank of England, focusing on enhancing cross-border payment systems and interlinking real-time gross settlement (RTGS) systems. These efforts aim to improve efficiency and reduce costs in international transactions.
